introduction.name: Tanush
introduction.headline: Software Engineer
introduction.summary: I'm a backend-focused software engineer passionate about scalable systems, distributed architectures, and cloud infrastructure. I enjoy building resilient, well-structured services that support long-term maintainability and performance.
introduction.description: Outside of engineering, I explore quantitative trading systems, statistical arbitrage, and personal finance automation. I enjoy combining strong software foundations with curiosity-driven experimentation across AI, backend systems, and markets.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.company: CEI India Private Limited - Subsidiary of CEI America
experience.summary: Building internal AI systems and QA automation platforms with ownership across architecture, deployments, testing workflows, and organization-scale rollout.
highlights: Building an AI code generation tool that analyzes requirements, writes specifications, generates code, and runs unit tests to validate functionality.
Integrated an internal AI testing tool that verifies generated code through automated UI actions and end-to-end flows on lightweight local deployments.
Scaled the QA automation platform for organization-wide adoption, generating 250+ test cases from screenshots in 45 minutes and reducing manual effort by 70%.
Built a multi-agent architecture with configurable output depth across Quick, Think, and Deep Think modes based on project needs.

Configured on-prem LLM servers with Nginx and load balancing for secure, subscription-free AI access, and managed SDLC through Azure DevOps with Docker-based deployments, code reviews, and sprint planning.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.company: CEI India Private Limited - Subsidiary of CEI America
experience.summary: Built the first internal QA tool prototype and agent-based workflow foundation that later expanded into a larger organization-facing platform.
highlights: Built the first version of the QA automation tool and multi-agent system, proving the concept and helping secure project funding.
Developed automation scripts using PowerShell and Microsoft Power Platform to accelerate internal reporting and repetitive workflows.
Worked with Agile methodologies and CI/CD practices in day-to-day delivery, resulting in an immediate full-time offer.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
experience.summary: Delivered a predictive HR analytics project under a tight deadline using Python-based analysis, visualization, and team coordination.
highlights: Worked in a team to deliver a predictive HR analytics project using Python, Pandas, and Scikit-Learn within a strict two-month timeline.
Created data visualizations to identify attrition factors and helped manage delivery timelines to ensure successful completion.

expertise.description: Backend and application development across Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, and Python-based systems.
Deployment-ready infrastructure work across AWS, Docker, Nginx, and production-oriented data storage.
Systems thinking around APIs, microservices, delivery pipelines, architecture, and end-to-end software execution.
Practical engineering with Git workflows, agent systems, testing tools, and developer-first automation.

projects.title: RideShare Application
projects.description: A ride-sharing backend built with microservices, API Gateway orchestration, JWT-based security, Dockerized deployment, and AWS hosting.
projects.summary: Led backend development in Python using Flask to build ride matching, user management, and payments services. Designed the system around scalable microservices, centralized request flow through an API Gateway, and a container-first AWS deployment model.
highlights: Led backend development for ride matching, users, and payments
Architected microservices with API Gateway and JWT-based security
Containerized the system and deployed it on AWS EC2 with S3-backed assets

details.title: Architecture
details.content: The platform was designed around modular backend services to keep business domains separated while preserving a clear request path through an API Gateway.

details.title: Deployment
details.content: Dockerized services made the system portable across environments, and AWS EC2 plus S3 provided a practical cloud deployment setup for the project lifecycle.

details.title: Leadership
details.content: Tanush led backend ownership, set project milestones, coordinated delivery, and ensured the team stayed aligned on timelines and scope.

projects.title: Quantitative Trading System
projects.description: A Python-based pairs trading system built around statistical arbitrage, data analysis, signal generation, and repeatable research workflows.
projects.summary: Designed a robust pairs trading system using statistical arbitrage concepts, demonstrating strength in financial data analysis, statistical modeling, and systematic signal generation. The project achieved a 75% success rate in predicting the probability of profitability.
highlights: Designed a research-driven pairs trading workflow in Python
Applied statistical modeling and financial data analysis to generate signals
Achieved a 75% success rate in predicting probability of profitability

details.title: Research Flow
details.content: The system focused on identifying pairs, analyzing relationships, modeling mean-reversion behavior, and translating those observations into systematic trading signals.

details.title: Core Strength
details.content: This project reflects Tanush's interest in combining software engineering with quantitative reasoning, especially in data pipelines, model evaluation, and strategy iteration.

education.title: B.Tech. Computer Science & Engineering

Best Manoeuvrable Vehicle - SAE India Dr. G. Padmanabham Memorial Electric Two-Wheeler Design Competition
One of the department's highest GPAs with a 9.83 in fifth semester
Solved 400+ DSA problems on LeetCode

testimonials.author: Gouri Shankar Prusty P
testimonials.content: Tanush isn't just a colleague I respect, he's one of my closest friends from college, and we've known each other for over 4 years. From day one, I saw a spark in his curiosity, especially around finance and data science, and that passion has only grown stronger with time. His commitment to continuous learning is inspiring.

contact.availability: Open to backend, platform, AI tooling, and systems-focused opportunities.
